clustering_principle: OSM Residential Land-use Masking (20m buffer soft-edge)

segments.boundary_logic: Bounded by Norf S-Bahn rail corridor to the east and L380 to the west. Continuous low-rise residential cluster southwest of the station.
PLZ 41464 wider bbox (51.125–51.175, 6.635–6.755), secondary-filtered by OSM addr:postcode tag. 3481 out-of-PLZ buildings excluded. Geometry is POINT (centroid only).
expansion_caveats: building_count includes all residential OSM ways tagged addr:postcode=41464
field_01 uses standard footprint proxy, not polygon area — confidence 0.65
field_02 uses OSM building tag, not spatial adjacency — confidence 0.70
foundation gate via PLZ 41464 bridge: 107 clusters, 51% PASS
morphology_variance_flag=true — SFH/rowhouse mixed; type split less certain than NEUSS_NORF_01

segments.boundary_logic: High-value central detached housing cluster near city park area. Masked by urban park buffer logic.
Mixed-use transition block adjacent to historical core. High building density with apartment-rowhouse mix.
PLZ 41472 bounding box, secondary-filtered by OSM addr:postcode tag. 2047 out-of-PLZ buildings excluded. Geometry is POINT (centroid only) — polygon extraction would require full way-node fetch.
expansion_caveats: building_count includes all residential OSM ways tagged addr:postcode=41472
field_01 uses standard footprint proxy (130/80/60 m2 by type), not polygon area — confidence 0.65
field_02 uses OSM building tag, not spatial adjacency — confidence 0.70
foundation gate via PLZ 41472 bridge: 63 clusters, 81% PASS
Adjacency classification (semi/rowhouse) is NOT available for this segment
